messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The briefing email buries its observables — render the markdown body to HTML for the email
What it solves: THE DEFECT IS PRESENTATION, NOT DATA LOSS. `docs/briefings/2026-07-14.md` on main DOES contain the
full Delivery-metrics / Agent-business / Optimizer / Process-hiccups sections (velocity, cycle time,
suite duration, per-role token cost, stage-dwell, pending approvals). But `send-unsent-briefings!`
…
How it works: The body is sent as a rendered HTML part alongside the plain-text markdown
